name: @groundwork/monorepo
description: The decision layer that makes AI development actually work at team scale

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=@groundwork/mcp-server && npm run build --workspace=@groundwork/cli && npm run build --workspace=@groundwork/api && npm run build --workspace=@groundwork/github-action
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace=@groundwork/mcp-server
scripts.publish:cli: npm run build && npm publish --workspace=@groundwork/cli --access public

author: Groundwork
